specific_question: What initiatives did Elexion Automotive use in 2024 to engage its loyalty program members as part of its customer retention and brand advocacy strategy?
answer: Throughout 2024, Elexion Automotive organized local EV Maintenance Best Practices workshops for all major sales regions to engage customers and improve brand loyalty.
dr_question: Given that manufacturers typically lose all contact once their vehicles are resold by the original owner or dealer, how could Automotive Cloud's vehicle tracking capabilities help Elexion Automotive increase engagement with second-hand buyers of its EVs by 25% in North America by Q4 2025?
